title: skimmia reevesiana f. variegata
intro: Skimmia reevesiana f. variegata, also known as the variegated Reeves Skimmia, is a flowering evergreen shrub native to China, characterized by its distinctive white and green variegated leaves and white fragrant flowers. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Skimmia reevesiana f. variegata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Skimmia reevesiana f. variegata are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
